subject: Re: Your phones after hours — quick follow-up
body:
Hi Downtown Smiles Phoenix Dental Care team,

Just following up on my note from earlier this week about AI appointment booking.

I know inboxes get busy — so I'll keep this short: I set up an AI phone agent for a dental practice in 48 hours last month. It now books 8-12 appointments per week that would have gone to voicemail.

Happy to do a 10-minute demo over Zoom. No commitment — just want to show you what it looks like for a practice like yours.

Worth it?

— Wolfgang Meyer
hello@pantrymate.net

subject: Last note — AI appointment booking for Downtown Smiles Phoenix Dental Care
body:
Hi Downtown Smiles Phoenix Dental Care team,

Last note from me — I promise.

I've been reaching out to dental practices about AI appointment booking and wanted to leave one final resource before I move on:

The short version: practices that implement 24/7 AI phone coverage typically recover $800-2,500/month in previously lost bookings within the first 60 days.

If timing is ever right, I'm at hello@pantrymate.net.

Best,
Wolfgang Meyer

subject: How many hours did your team waste on tasks AI could do in seconds?
body:
Hey Eclipse Marketing,

Quick question — how much of your team's week goes into things like writing follow-up emails, qualifying leads, updating CRM records, or answering the same customer questions over and over?

For most marketing agency teams, it's 10-15 hours per week. Per person.

That's not a people problem — it's a workflow problem. And AI can fix it.

I'm Wolfgang, founder of Wolfpack AI. We build custom AI agents that plug into your existing tools (email, CRM, Slack, phone) and take care of the repetitive ops work — so your team focuses on the stuff only humans can do.

Worth a 20-minute call to see what we'd automate first?

— Wolfgang
Wolfpack AI
hello@pantrymate.net
